headline: Assessing Trimble (TRMB) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Subscription Growth Narrative
summary: Trimble (TRMB) has drawn attention after its share price fell about 19% over the past month and about 17% over the past 3 months, prompting investors to reassess the stock. See our latest analysis for Trimble. At the latest share price of US$55.97, Trimble’s momentum has cooled, with the 30 day share price return down about 19% and the year to date share price return down about 29%. However, the 3 year total shareholder return of about 20% underlines a very different longer term picture. If...

headline: Trimble Glacier Mapping Highlights Growing Role In Climate And Geospatial Work
summary: Trimble's GNSS positioning technology supported the Project Pressure Melting Topics expedition in Papua, Indonesia. The project mapped rapidly receding tropical glaciers with centimeter level accuracy in challenging terrain. The work enabled detailed 3D modeling of glacier retreat to aid climate research and local resource planning. For investors watching NasdaqGS:TRMB, this project illustrates how the company’s core strengths in positioning, modeling, and geospatial data extend into high...
